top_signals.title: Oil prices rise as Trump warns of ‘very hard’ strikes against Iran
top_signals.summary: President Trump has escalated his threats against the Iranian regime, announcing on social media that the US will hit Iran “very hard” tonight if a peace deal cannot be reached.  In a post on his Truth Social platform, the US President suggested that American forces could take Kharg Island, a crucial oil export artery for [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Oil Fluctuates as US Threatens to Take Key Iranian Export Hub
top_signals.summary: Oil flipped between gains and losses in thin trading as traders weighed President Donald Trump’s threats to step up attacks on key Iranian energy infrastructure.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.summary: Statistical Notices update the definitions and guidance contained in the Banking Statistics Yellow Folder
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Oracle Falls on Data Center Spending; Hugo Boss, Stitch Fix Rally | Stock Movers
top_signals.summary:
On this episode of Stock Movers with Alexis Christoforous:

- Oracle (ORCL) shares are lower after the company reported quarterly capital expenses that were higher than estimates. The company expects to spend about $70 billion on net capital expenditures in the current fiscal year, which ends in May 2027.

- Hugo Boss (BOSS) shares are moving on news Frasers Group Plc offered to buy the rest of Hugo Boss AG for about €2 billion ($2.3 billion) as billionaire Mike Ashley seeks to add another fashion brand to his growing collection.

- Stitch Fix (SFIX) shares are moving as it bumped up its fiscal-year outlook after revenue rose in its latest quarter, citing a boost from efforts to improve its customer experience and assortment. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: SpaceX Treated as ‘Simply Too Risky’ for Funds With Governance Mandates
top_signals.summary: The list of sustainability-focused fund managers opting to blacklist SpaceX is growing, as they contemplate the unprecedented level of control that Elon Musk will hold over the rockets-to-chatbot behemoth.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: World Bank cuts global growth outlook to 2.5%, warns of drop to 1.3% if war fallout spreads to markets - Reuters
top_signals.summary: World Bank cuts global growth outlook to 2.5%, warns of drop to 1.3% if war fallout spreads to markets  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Supreme Court Shields Investment Funds From Some Shareholder Suits
top_signals.summary: The US Supreme Court shielded funds from some investor lawsuits in a 6-3 vote, blocking activist investors from suing 11 closed-end funds. Tyler Kendall reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.title: The ‘Miasma’ worm source code briefly leaked on GitHub
top_signals.summary: The Miasma credential-stealing attack framework, which has recently targeted open-source ecosystems through supply-chain attacks, was briefly open-sourced on GitHub. [...]
